_comment: Dev deployed-environment overrides (009-dev-auto-deploy). NO SECRETS here — all Dev secrets (DB connection string, Jwt:Secret, Sentry:Dsn, Stripe/Storage keys) are injected at deploy/run time from the managed secret store (S2068; SC-006). Loaded only when ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Dev.

Cors._AllowedOriginSuffixes_comment: Dev-only: permit per-deploy Cloudflare Pages preview origins (https://<hash>.nekohoa-dev.pages.dev) so the post-deploy Playwright smoke gate can authenticate. Host-suffix match with a leading dot; NOT set in Production.
